name: Rent Reminder
description: Payment reminder notification with contextual styling for upcoming, due today, and overdue states. Includes one-click payment action.
visual_brief: Notification-style card or banner with contextual coloring based on payment state. Upcoming (blue/info tint) shows a calendar icon with 'Rent due in X days', the amount, and a 'Pay Now' button. Due today (yellow/warning tint) shows an alert icon with 'Rent due today', the amount prominently, and an urgent 'Pay Now' button. Overdue (red/destructive tint) shows a warning triangle icon with 'Rent overdue by X days', the amount with late fee breakdown, and a 'Pay Now' button. Paid (green/success tint) shows a checkmark icon with 'Rent paid' and the payment date.

responsive.mobile: Full-width banner card. Amount text large for visibility. Pay button full-width at the bottom. Details stack vertically.
responsive.tablet: Standard card width. All elements in a comfortable layout. Pay button inline.
responsive.desktop: Card or inline banner. All information on one or two lines. Pay button on the right.
